name: Aurora Weather
releaseNotes: Publishes the widget reliability and signing-migration build: widget refresh now falls back to the last successful coordinate when Android withholds a background fix, Settings/menu expose widget diagnostics, and the optional live-location foreground service can keep the widget tracking movement. This store build uses the new Aurora Weather release certificate; existing debug-signed installs need a one-time uninstall/reinstall.
description: Aurora Weather is a local weather app focused on clear current conditions, forecasts, rain awareness, widgets, and location-aware updates. It can follow the phone's current position, actively refresh widget weather after movement, cache recent results, and support practical daily/weather-alert workflows without requiring an account.
